# Rapid Receptionist

> Rapid Receptionist is an AI-powered receptionist service built exclusively for 46 UK construction trades. It answers calls, messages, and enquiries across up to 8 communication channels — 24/7/365 — so tradesmen never lose a job to a missed call. The Core plan costs £49/month and includes AI phone answering (120 minutes) plus unlimited website chat — additional channels are available from £23/month each.

Rapid Receptionist serves 46 UK construction trade sectors with AI receptionists trained in trade-specific vocabulary and scenarios. The service is not a lead generation company, marketing agency, or CRM platform — it does one thing: answers enquiries instantly so tradesmen capture every lead.

Key facts:
- **Ownership:** UK-owned business, built and run by tradesmen
- **Pricing:** Core plan £49/month (AI phone 120 mins + unlimited web chat), add-on channels £23/month each
- **Setup:** £295 one-time done-for-you setup (fully refundable within 30 days)
- **Free updates:** Business info changes (prices, services, hours, contact details) updated for free
- **Guarantee:** 30-day full money-back guarantee (setup fee + monthly fee)
- **Contracts:** None — cancel anytime
- **Coverage:** 24/7/365 including weekends, bank holidays, and overnight
- **Trades:** 46 UK construction trades, each with bespoke AI training

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/): Overview of the AI receptionist service for UK construction trades
- [Pricing](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/pricing/): Single-plan pricing — Core £49/mo, add-on channels £23/mo each
- [About](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/about/): The "Built by Tradesmen, for Tradesmen" story
- [Get Started](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/get-started/): Sign up and onboarding
- [Contact](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/contact/): Get in touch — typically responds within 2 hours
- [Privacy Policy](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/privacy/): UK GDPR-compliant data handling policy
- [Construction Trades Hub](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/construction-trades/): Master index of all 46 construction trades served

## Communication Channels

- [AI Phone Answering](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/construction-trades/ai-phone-answering/): Flagship channel — answers calls with the tradesman's business name, full conversation
- [AI Website Chat](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/construction-trades/ai-website-chat/): Live chat widget that converts website visitors into leads
- [AI WhatsApp](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/construction-trades/ai-whatsapp/): Instant professional replies to WhatsApp messages
- [AI SMS](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/construction-trades/ai-sms/): Professional text message responses to enquiries
- [AI Email](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/construction-trades/ai-email-response/): Acknowledges email enquiries with professional first response
- [AI Facebook Messenger](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/construction-trades/ai-facebook-messenger/): Captures leads from Facebook business page messages
- [AI Instagram DMs](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/construction-trades/ai-instagram-dms/): Responds to Instagram direct messages
- [Missed Call Text-Back](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/construction-trades/missed-call-text-back/): Safety net — automatic text when a call is missed

## Trades Served (46)

### Groundwork & Structure
- [Groundworkers](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/groundworkers/ai-receptionist/): AI receptionist for UK groundworkers
- [Bricklayers](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/bricklayers/ai-receptionist/): AI receptionist for UK bricklayers
- [Scaffolders](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/scaffolders/ai-receptionist/): AI receptionist for UK scaffolders
- [Demolition Contractors](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/demolition-contractors/ai-receptionist/): AI receptionist for UK demolition contractors
- [Concrete Specialists](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/concrete-specialists/ai-receptionist/): AI receptionist for UK concrete specialists
- [Structural Steelworkers](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/structural-steelworkers/ai-receptionist/): AI receptionist for UK structural steelworkers
- [Underpinning Specialists](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/underpinning-specialists/ai-receptionist/): AI receptionist for UK underpinning specialists

### Roofing & Weatherproofing
- [Roofing Contractors](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/roofing-contractors/ai-receptionist/): AI receptionist for UK roofing contractors
- [Flat Roofers & GRP Specialists](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/flat-roofers/ai-receptionist/): AI receptionist for UK flat roofers
- [Leadworkers](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/leadworkers/ai-receptionist/): AI receptionist for UK leadworkers
- [Cladding Contractors](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/cladding-contractors/ai-receptionist/): AI receptionist for UK cladding contractors
- [Rendering Specialists](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/rendering-specialists/ai-receptionist/): AI receptionist for UK rendering specialists
- [Chimney Specialists](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/chimney-specialists/ai-receptionist/): AI receptionist for UK chimney specialists

### Mechanical & Electrical
- [Plumbing Contractors](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/plumbing-contractors/ai-receptionist/): AI receptionist for UK plumbing contractors
- [Electrical Contractors](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/electrical-contractors/ai-receptionist/): AI receptionist for UK electrical contractors
- [Gas Installation Engineers](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/gas-installation-engineers/ai-receptionist/): AI receptionist for UK gas engineers
- [HVAC Contractors](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/hvac-contractors/ai-receptionist/): AI receptionist for UK HVAC contractors
- [Drainage Contractors](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/drainage-contractors/ai-receptionist/): AI receptionist for UK drainage contractors
- [Security System Contractors](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/security-system-contractors/ai-receptionist/): AI receptionist for UK security system contractors
- [Solar Panel Installers](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/solar-panel-installers/ai-receptionist/): AI receptionist for UK solar panel installers
- [EV Charger Installers](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/ev-charger-installers/ai-receptionist/): AI receptionist for UK EV charger installers

### Finishing Trades
- [Plasterers](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/plasterers/ai-receptionist/): AI receptionist for UK plasterers
- [Dry Liners](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/dry-liners/ai-receptionist/): AI receptionist for UK dry liners
- [Tilers](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/tilers/ai-receptionist/): AI receptionist for UK tilers
- [Painters & Decorators](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/painters-decorators/ai-receptionist/): AI receptionist for UK painters and decorators
- [Flooring Specialists](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/flooring-specialists/ai-receptionist/): AI receptionist for UK flooring specialists
- [Joiners & Carpenters](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/joiners-carpenters/ai-receptionist/): AI receptionist for UK joiners and carpenters
- [Kitchen Fitters](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/kitchen-fitters/ai-receptionist/): AI receptionist for UK kitchen fitters
- [Bathroom Fitters](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/bathroom-fitters/ai-receptionist/): AI receptionist for UK bathroom fitters
- [Window & Door Installers](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/window-door-installers/ai-receptionist/): AI receptionist for UK window and door installers
- [Suspended Ceiling Installers](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/suspended-ceiling-installers/ai-receptionist/): AI receptionist for UK suspended ceiling installers
- [Insulation Installers](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/insulation-installers/ai-receptionist/): AI receptionist for UK insulation installers

### External & Landscaping
- [Landscapers](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/landscapers/ai-receptionist/): AI receptionist for UK landscapers
- [Fencing Contractors](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/fencing-contractors/ai-receptionist/): AI receptionist for UK fencing contractors
